calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Oct-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Harrison for Robert Coleman.

Mr. Harrison stated that the insurance policy has a current cash value of $80,000.00 with a death benefit of $100,000.00. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
